creator: ohauer@gmx.de
text:
> This issue and fix should really be raised upstream with the Nagios  
> Plugins development team, it's their call.  If a fix is committed to  
> the trunk branch to resolve this issue, I am more than happy to merge  
> it backwards until the next release.
> 
> Jarrod.


Hi Jarrod,

thanks for the notice.

I have already open a ticket at 'Nagios Plugin Development'
https://sourceforge.net/tracker/?func=detail&atid=397599&aid=2179754&group_id=29880

Hope the developers adopt the patch or fix the code in near future.

I will inform you if I get response from the developers or if another fix is aviable.

Until the patch is in the code/ports everyone can grap it also here:
http://sorry.mine.nu/patches/FreeBSD/ports/nagios-plugins/

olli
--
